northstar_statement: Build a local-first, ephemeral, cybersecurity-hardened AI swarm cluster that can execute life, work, cyber, research, and humanity tasks while preserving operator control, evidence, approval gates, and full auditability.

principles.name: Local-First
principles.description: Swarm operates primarily on local hardware; cloud is opt-in, not default.

principles.name: Ephemeral Execution
principles.description: All agent workers are disposable; no persistent state in execution context.

principles.name: Operator Control
principles.description: Every HIGH-risk operation requires human operator approval before execution.

principles.name: Full Auditability
principles.description: Every action is logged, hash-stamped, and traceable to a specific agent and run.

principles.name: Evidence-First
principles.description: No control is considered active unless backed by a verifiable evidence artifact.

principles.name: Cybersecurity-Hardened
principles.description: Attack surface is minimized: ports, credentials, and skills are gated by policy.

principles.name: Zero Trust within Cluster
principles.description: Each node authenticates per-request; no implicit trust between cluster members.

controls.name: Worker Disposability
controls.evidence: artifacts/qa/northstar_doctrine.md — ephemeral doctrine written; runtime enforcement pending P2

controls.name: No Credential Persistence
controls.evidence: artifacts/qa/northstar_doctrine.md — doctrine sealed; agent process TTL config pending

controls.name: Zero Trust Auth between Nodes
controls.evidence: config/asset_trust_registry.json — approved/denied caps per node (PR-2 d8004b3)

controls.name: Worker Profile Enforcement
controls.evidence: config/cluster_worker_profiles.json — 5 profiles, resource limits, ephemeral/storage policy (PR-2 d8004b3)

controls.name: Port Exposure Audit
controls.evidence: config/port_hardening_audit.json — 8000/3000 localhost-only PASS; 7 non-swarm LAN ports need identification

controls.name: LAN Approval Gate
controls.evidence: config/port_hardening_audit.json — LAN policy defined; 5 unknown Python processes LAN-exposed, not yet identified

controls.name: Firewall Policy Documentation
controls.evidence: config/port_hardening_audit.json — no host firewall configured; macOS firewall review pending
